/TEXT:TRIAL PHASE JURY DELIBERATIONS/X:JUROR NO, 2 IS STILL ABSENT AND WASDISCHARGED FOR REASON STATED ON THE RECORD,COURT DECLARES A MISTRIAL AS THERE ARE NO MORE AVAILABLE ALTERNATE JURORS,/CONTD:TO SET TRIAL/NTW/LD:12-17-07/

/TEXT:TRIAL PHASE JURY DELIBERATIONS/TRL PHASE JD/X:9:35 A,M,, THE CLERKRETURNED THE CALL OF JUROR NO, 2(BADGE NO, 1985245)WHO CALLED OCTOBER 12 AND 13 AND LEFT A MESSAGE THAT SHE CAN'T COME TO COURT TODAY,/X:CLERK IS ABLE TO TALK TO JUROR NO, 2 WHO SAID THAT SHE CAN'T COME BECAUSE SHE IS AFRAIDAND VERY DEPRESSED AND ON ADVICE OF A DOCTOR WAS TOLD TO REST,/X:WHEN ASKED WHAT SHE IS AFRAID OF, SHE ANSWERED THAT SHE IS AFRAID OF A FELLOW JURORWITHOUT IDENTIFYING ANY,/  /X:THE CLERK INFORMED THE COURT OF WHAT TRANSPIRED IN THE TELEPHOE CONVERSATION BETWEEN HIM AND JUROR NO,2/X:AS EARLY AS9:30 A,M,, THE 11 JURORS ARE OUTSIDE THE JURY ROOM AND WAITED FOR JUROR NO,2 TO SHOW UP,/X:THEY WERE ASKED TO WAIT OUTSIDE THE COURTROO,/X: 0:45 A,M,, THE 11 JURORS MINUS JUROR NO, 2 ARE USHERED IN THE COURTROM BY THE BAILIFF,/X:THE 11 JURORS ARE TOLD BY THE COURT THAT JUROR NO, 2 CAN'T COME TOCOURTTODAY AND AFTER AN ADMONISHMENT, WAS ORDERED TO BE BACK TOMORROW, 10-16-07 AT 9:30 A,M,/X:1:55 P,M,JACQUIE LAWRENCE CALLED THE CLERK OF DEPT 26TO SAY THAT JUROR NO, 2 DELIVERED A LETTER A FEW MINUTES AGO TO THE JURY OFFICE AND WITH THE CLERK WHO RECEIVED IT, INFORMED THE COURT OF WHAT TRANSPIRED,/
/CAL:JURY TRIAL/TEXT:TRIAL PHASE PRETRIAL MOTIONS IN PROGRESS/CONTD:PRETRIAL MOITONS/DEF:PERSONALLY WAIVED TIME FOR JURY TRIAL/DOP/ADPRS1:09-13-92 &05-26-93/
/TEXT:DEFT IS ORDERED HELD TO ANSWER/HOLDING//WIT SWORN:JULIAN HILL AND KAHRI GILL-KEHOE/EXHMA:8, 9 AND 9A/HTA1:1,2,4,5,7,8,10,13 & 14/ /871D:3,6,9,11 & 12/BAIL:500000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/
